data.content: Pushed dispatch swap framing cleanup in a39fc565: Dispatch now owns the single global Swap Agent presentation via a Dispatch Tools area, the step pool editors no longer advertise swap behavior, and the layout regression test now locks the swap UI to that one dispatch-level control. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run lint (warnings only, pre-existing); bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
